textByHashes.d86d40ccd1436a3e7f289a5e9ce9a92744497808: Greetings! I am Hassan, Chancellor to the Emir of Al Kharid.
textByHashes.06757f28924ba1fe0e673936ea1e8e6f138cba80: Well... we do currently have a very urgent issue we need to resolve, and I suppose you look like someone who knows how to get a job done. Are you definitely interested in helping?
textByHashes.bc215c7a11629e0759a6983d7ea1cfc81c586d54: You'll find our Spymaster, Osman, just outside the palace. Go to him and tell him I sent you. He will fill you in on the details of our problem.
textByHashes.daaa59e06a38f3cdf5b9db4edcf0e62d67c9c8ea: I see. Well you know where to find me if you do wish to help us.
textByHashes.8f337c748e7b3fa15f737caec8afa3156d294d24: Hello again. Have you spoken to Osman yet? He should be just outside the palace.
textByHashes.57dbaec92f6fd08846d7717560a96988b7384033: Hello again. I hear you have agreed to help rescue Prince Ali. On behalf of the Emir, I will have a reward ready for you upon your success.
textByHashes.ec6329bb3885a650447a93ca7265a29a9402bda7: Prince Ali is home safe. You have the eternal gratitude of the Emir for rescuing his son. Please, take this payment as a thank you.
textByHashes.18410c295a32ef3a465907b3b3baeef2bb0ae64c: We manage, in our humble way. We are a wealthy town and we have water. It cures many thirsts.
textByHashes.61219c28b641a4ae27a9a001f42e4eb75b28636e: Kill our warriors? I assume this is some sort of joke?
textByHashes.858f31b8552f1189b2a117e1396448c48340e4bc: Thank you for being a friend to Al Kharid. You are always welcome here.
